title: Shakedown on Kalthis
body: The crew dropped out of hyperspace over Kalthis Station with a borrowed transponder, a half-burned nav chart, and three different reasons to avoid Imperial customs. Their contact never arrived at Docking Arm Seven, but a damaged courier droid did.

After a tense search through the station's maintenance ring, Vera recovered the droid's encrypted cylinder while Kade drew security patrols away from the lower concourse. Juno traced the ambush back to a local broker working both sides of the blockade.
The session ended with the crew in possession of the cylinder, one damaged freighter, and a warning that the broker's buyers are already tracking them.
